---
title: FastStats
date: '2026-06-23'
description: Fast, Client-side Analytics
categories:
- R
- Data Visualization
- Data Science
featured: true
icon: gauge
---

[Open Tool](https://noahweidig.com/faststats/){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A lightweight, browser-based analytics tool for quickly exploring datasets with interactive visualizations and summary statistics—no installation required.
